name: Deoxys
description: An alien virus that fell to Earth on a meteor underwent a cellular mutation upon exposure to a high-energy laser beam, emerging as a psychic god.
originLore: An extraterrestrial virus rode a meteor into Earth's gravity well. A high-energy laser mutated its cells into Deoxys — a psychic singularity with four combat morphologies.

lore.celestialConcordance: Deoxys rebuilds its frame in heartbeats, trading durability for speed or the reverse as the battle matrix demands.

quantumResonators.name: Psycho Boost
quantumResonators.description: Overclocks psychic output until the frame destabilizes.

quantumResonators.name: Form Shift
quantumResonators.description: Reconfigures cellular armor between Attack, Defense, Speed, and Normal cores.
